title: Research And Synthesis
summary: Use AI to speed up reading, synthesis, and insight generation while staying anchored in source material.

lessons.sequenceRationale: This lesson exists here to move the learner from understanding the pattern to applying it on a live work artifact.
lessons.title: Research Starts With A Question
lessons.subtitle: Vague research requests create vague synthesis.
lessons.objective: Frame research tasks so AI helps narrow, compare, and summarize instead of producing generic overviews.
lessons.useWhen: Vague research requests create vague synthesis.
lessons.whyItMatters: A sharp research question drives what sources matter, what output shape you need, and how you will judge success.

coreConcepts.title: Ask Decision-Oriented Questions
coreConcepts.text: Research is more useful when tied to a decision, recommendation, or known uncertainty.

coreConcepts.title: Bound The Scope
coreConcepts.text: Define the timeframe, geography, audience, or competitor set so the model does not drift into filler.

coreConcepts.title: State The Output
coreConcepts.text: Say whether you want a scan, comparison, risk list, or recommendation draft.

workedExample.scenario: A PM asks AI for "everything important" about a market segment.
workedExample.approach: They narrow the ask to adoption risks, buyer criteria, and three competitors.
workedExample.result: The synthesis becomes much more actionable.
workedExample.verification: The PM checks whether every major claim ties back to an identifiable source or source note.

doThisNow.task: Rewrite one current research task as a decision-oriented research brief.
steps: Name how you will verify the answer.

commonMistakes: Starting with tools before defining the question.
Not deciding how the output will be used.

roleVariants.manager: Use AI to shorten prep, synthesis, and communication loops without removing judgment.
roleVariants.writer: Push for clearer source material, tighter briefs, and reusable language patterns.
roleVariants.analyst: Separate analysis from storytelling so you can verify numbers before sharing narratives.
roleVariants.operator: Build repeatable handoff-ready outputs instead of one-off conversations.

sourceNotes: Reviewed for business IC relevance and durable workflow guidance.
Keep verification and organizational policy checks explicit in future revisions.

lessons.sequenceRationale: This lesson exists here to move the learner from understanding the pattern to applying it on a live work artifact.
lessons.title: Summarize For Action
lessons.subtitle: A useful summary tells the reader what matters and what to do next.
lessons.objective: Produce summaries that retain key nuance while making action easier.
lessons.useWhen: A useful summary tells the reader what matters and what to do next.
lessons.whyItMatters: Many AI summaries are technically correct but operationally useless because they compress content without preserving the decision context.

coreConcepts.title: Summarize To A Reader
coreConcepts.text: The summary should reflect what the reader needs to know, not just what the source contains.

coreConcepts.title: Preserve What Could Change The Decision
coreConcepts.text: Caveats, constraints, and outliers matter if they would alter the next step.

coreConcepts.title: Add A Recommended Next Move
coreConcepts.text: A summary becomes more useful when it ends with open questions or recommended actions.

workedExample.scenario: A writer summarizes a long vendor document for procurement.
workedExample.approach: They ask for a summary focused on pricing levers, implementation risk, and unanswered questions.
workedExample.result: Procurement gets a concise document that supports the next meeting.
workedExample.verification: The writer verifies every pricing or commitment statement against the source document.

doThisNow.task: Summarize one document into an action-oriented format for a real reader.
steps: Check the key claims against the source.

commonMistakes: Treating a summary as a substitute for source review on high-risk material.

roleVariants.manager: Use AI to shorten prep, synthesis, and communication loops without removing judgment.
roleVariants.writer: Push for clearer source material, tighter briefs, and reusable language patterns.
roleVariants.analyst: Separate analysis from storytelling so you can verify numbers before sharing narratives.
roleVariants.operator: Build repeatable handoff-ready outputs instead of one-off conversations.

sourceNotes: Reviewed for business IC relevance and durable workflow guidance.
Keep verification and organizational policy checks explicit in future revisions.

lessons.sequenceRationale: This lesson exists here to move the learner from understanding the pattern to applying it on a live work artifact.
lessons.title: Synthesize Across Sources
lessons.subtitle: The value is in the comparison, not just the compression.
lessons.objective: Combine multiple documents into a coherent comparison or takeaway set.
lessons.useWhen: The value is in the comparison, not just the compression.
lessons.whyItMatters: AI is useful when the job is not only to read faster, but to spot patterns, disagreements, and recurring themes across materials.

coreConcepts.title: Normalize The Inputs
coreConcepts.text: Tell the model how to compare the sources: by theme, risk, opportunity, audience, or timeline.

coreConcepts.title: Track Agreement And Conflict
coreConcepts.text: A synthesis is more trustworthy when it separates shared conclusions from contested ones.

coreConcepts.title: Keep Source Traceability
coreConcepts.text: If the synthesis will influence a decision, preserve notes on where each major point came from.

workedExample.scenario: An analyst compares customer feedback, support tickets, and win-loss notes.
workedExample.approach: They ask AI to cluster common themes and call out where the sources disagree.
workedExample.result: The synthesis is more useful than three separate summaries.
workedExample.verification: The analyst spot-checks one example for each major theme against the underlying source set.

doThisNow.task: Take two to three related inputs and create a single comparison grid.
steps: Ask AI to separate agreement from conflict.
Verify one point from each theme.

commonMistakes: Letting the model collapse disagreements into false consensus.
Losing track of which source supported which claim.

roleVariants.manager: Use AI to shorten prep, synthesis, and communication loops without removing judgment.
roleVariants.writer: Push for clearer source material, tighter briefs, and reusable language patterns.
roleVariants.analyst: Separate analysis from storytelling so you can verify numbers before sharing narratives.
roleVariants.operator: Build repeatable handoff-ready outputs instead of one-off conversations.

lessons.sequenceRationale: This lesson exists here to move the learner from understanding the pattern to applying it on a live work artifact.
lessons.title: Challenge The Research Output
lessons.subtitle: Good synthesis still needs interrogation.
lessons.objective: Use AI to critique its own research output and reveal weak claims, missing evidence, or blind spots.
lessons.whyItMatters: The first research output should rarely be the final one. A second-pass critique surfaces what still needs checking.

coreConcepts.title: Ask For Missing Evidence
coreConcepts.text: Have the model identify which conclusions are strongest, weakest, and dependent on assumptions.

coreConcepts.title: Separate Fact From Inference
coreConcepts.text: Many research mistakes come from passing off an interpretation as if it were directly observed.

coreConcepts.title: Turn Weakness Into Follow-Up Work
coreConcepts.text: The right response to uncertainty is a next question, not fake confidence.

workedExample.scenario: A research summary recommends a vendor aggressively.
workedExample.approach: The user asks the model to critique the recommendation, list assumptions, and identify missing evidence.
workedExample.result: The output becomes more balanced and decision-ready.
workedExample.verification: The user checks that the critique points map back to actual gaps in the source material.

doThisNow.task: Run a critique pass on one AI-generated summary you already have.
steps: Turn the answer into follow-up questions.

commonMistakes: Treating the first synthesis as final.
Not converting open questions into follow-up research.

roleVariants.manager: Use AI to shorten prep, synthesis, and communication loops without removing judgment.
roleVariants.writer: Push for clearer source material, tighter briefs, and reusable language patterns.
roleVariants.analyst: Separate analysis from storytelling so you can verify numbers before sharing narratives.
roleVariants.operator: Build repeatable handoff-ready outputs instead of one-off conversations.

lessons.sequenceRationale: This lesson exists here to move the learner from understanding the pattern to applying it on a live work artifact.
lessons.title: Build A Research Workflow
lessons.subtitle: Good research is a repeatable sequence, not a single magic prompt.
lessons.objective: Create a repeatable AI-assisted workflow for reading, synthesis, critique, and final output.
lessons.useWhen: Good research is a repeatable sequence, not a single magic prompt.
lessons.whyItMatters: A workflow is easier to trust, teach, and improve than a collection of disconnected chat sessions.

coreConcepts.title: Collect
coreConcepts.text: Gather and label the sources that matter.

coreConcepts.title: Synthesize
coreConcepts.text: Ask for a structured comparison or action summary.

coreConcepts.title: Critique
coreConcepts.text: Challenge the weak spots and verify the critical claims.

workedExample.scenario: An operator regularly prepares market scans for a weekly leadership meeting.
workedExample.approach: They standardize the sequence and store the output format and review checks.
workedExample.result: The scan becomes faster, more consistent, and easier for others to cover.
workedExample.verification: The workflow includes a required check on freshness and source credibility before the scan is shared.

doThisNow.task: Write your own five-step research workflow for a recurring task.
steps: Add the critique and verification step.

commonMistakes: Not saving the workflow once it works.

roleVariants.manager: Use AI to shorten prep, synthesis, and communication loops without removing judgment.
roleVariants.writer: Push for clearer source material, tighter briefs, and reusable language patterns.
roleVariants.analyst: Separate analysis from storytelling so you can verify numbers before sharing narratives.
roleVariants.operator: Build repeatable handoff-ready outputs instead of one-off conversations.

outcomes: Summarize and synthesize source material better.
nextModuleBridge: Next, level up prompting for more complex and multi-step work.
